notes: This file is owned by Agent 05 only.
Structure nests rounds inside sprints to keep history organized.

sprint_meta.notes: WK33 Agent 05: prefab footprint audit only (no sim footprint changes).
Verify new economy prefabs fit existing sim footprints in config.py BUILDING_SIZES.

agent_fields.result: PASS — all WK33 economy prefab footprints match sim BUILDING_SIZES (2x2). No footprint changes requested.
handoff_notes_for_agent_15: No JSON footprint mismatches found. Any in-game overshoot/clipping would be a prefab geometry extent issue (adjust prefab pieces), not a config.py footprint change.

validate_assets_report.notes: errors=0 per SUMMARY; WARN missing_model_file stubs expected for Ursina/prefab pipeline (legacy; same as prior sprints)

sprint_meta.notes: WK43 Stage 1: neutral plots + BuilderPeasant lifecycle (Agent 05 core sim/entity work).

what_i_changed: game/entities/neutral_buildings.py: NeutralBuilding + House/Farm/FoodStand now accept is_constructed; plots spawn with hp=1, is_constructed=False, requires_builder_peasant=True; neutral tax generation pauses until constructed.
game/entities/peasant.py: Regular peasants skip builder-only plots (requires_builder_peasant).

game/entities/builder_peasant.py (new): BuilderPeasant entity with lifecycle MOVE_TO_PLOT -> BUILDING -> RETURN_TO_CASTLE -> DESPAWN; marks plot requires_builder_peasant=False when construction completes.

game/systems/neutral_buildings.py: tick signature updated to tick(dt, buildings, heroes, peasants, castle); spawns plots + a BuilderPeasant; despawns builders once they reach the castle (removes from peasants list).
game/sim_engine.py: pass self.peasants into NeutralBuildingSystem.tick call site.
tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py (new): plot spawns unconstructed; builder constructs; builder returns + despawns; regular peasant ignores builder-only plots.
tests/test_neutral_buildings_wk32.py: updated NeutralBuildingSystem.tick call sites for new signature.

sprint_meta.notes: WK44 Stage 2: dynamic tree growth sim components (Tree + NatureSystem + unit tests). Integration owned by Agent 03.

scope_guardrails_followed: Did not edit: game/sim_engine.py, game/sim/snapshot.py, game/world.py, or any game/graphics files (Agent 03 owns integration).
what_i_changed: game/entities/nature.py (new): Tree dataclass with grid_x/grid_y, growth_percentage (default 0.25), growth_ms_accum and stable (tx,ty) key.
game/systems/nature.py (new): NatureSystem.tick(dt, trees) advances growth deterministically in discrete steps 0.25->0.5->0.75->1.0, with 2 minutes per transition (~6 minutes total).
tests/test_nature_growth.py (new): verifies growth hits 0.25/0.5/0.75/1.0 at 0/2/4/6 minutes.

sprint_meta.notes: WK45 Stage 2.5: sapling spawning logic in NatureSystem + tests (no integration files touched; Agent 03 owns wiring + removal-on-build).

scope_guardrails_followed: Did not edit: game/sim_engine.py, game/world.py, or any game/graphics files (Agent 03 owns integration + removal-on-build).
what_i_changed: game/systems/nature.py: added deterministic sapling spawning (1 per 30s global cadence) with cap=50; prefers near existing trees; falls back to any valid GRASS+buildable tile; marks world tile to TileType.TREE on spawn; added helper remove_trees_in_footprint for integration.
tests/test_nature_spawns_saplings.py (new): verifies cadence, tile marking, and cap enforcement.

sprint_meta.notes: WK46 Stage 3: BuilderPeasant gathers local wood (per-peasant) before building; integration of sim helpers + log stack visuals owned by Agent 03.

scope_guardrails_followed: Did not edit: game/sim_engine.py, game/sim/snapshot.py, game/world.py, or any game/graphics files (Agent 03 owns integration + renderer).
what_i_changed: config.py: added Stage 3 constants (BUILDER_CHOP_DURATION_S, BUILDER_HARVEST_DURATION_S, BUILDER_WOOD_COST_* and BUILDER_MIN_CHOP_GROWTH).

game/entities/builder_peasant.py: added wood-gathering phases (FIND_TREE/MOVE_TO_TREE/CHOPPING/HARVESTING/WAIT_ON_PLOT_NO_TREES) and per-peasant wood_inventory; prefers calling game_state['sim'] helpers (find_nearest_choppable_tree_for_builder / chop_tree_at / harvest_log_at) when present.
tests/test_wood_yield_by_growth.py: unit test for yield thresholds (1.0/0.75/0.50).
tests/test_builder_lumberjack_house.py: proves builder does not build until wood >= 10, then completes construction.
tests/test_builder_lumberjack_farm.py: proves farm requires multiple harvests to reach wood >= 20 before building.
tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py: updated harness to include minimal world + a tree so Stage 3 builder can complete.
how_to_test: python -m pytest -q tests/test_builder_lumberjack_house.py tests/test_builder_lumberjack_farm.py tests/test_wood_yield_by_growth.py tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py

pytest.command: python -m pytest -q tests/test_builder_lumberjack_house.py tests/test_builder_lumberjack_farm.py tests/test_wood_yield_by_growth.py tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py

coordination_notes_for_agent_03: BuilderPeasant expects integration helpers on sim exposed via game_state['sim']: find_nearest_choppable_tree_for_builder(from_tx,from_ty)->(tx,ty,growth)|None; chop_tree_at(tx,ty)->growth; harvest_log_at(tx,ty)->wood_amount.
HARVESTING phase no longer checks for TileType.TREE (tree should be removed on chop); it trusts harvest_log_at at completion time.

what_i_changed: game/systems/neutral_buildings.py: if any pending builder-only plots exist and there is no active BuilderPeasant, auto-spawn a replacement BuilderPeasant from the castle targeting the oldest pending plot; still blocks spawning new plots while one is pending.

game/entities/builder_peasant.py: if target plot has construction_started=True, skip wood gathering and resume BUILDING immediately (prevents double-paying wood when replacement builder is spawned mid-build).
tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py: added regression test test_builder_replaced_if_dies_mid_construction_and_plot_unblocks (builder dies mid-build -> replacement spawns -> plot completes).
game/systems/neutral_buildings.py: throughput tweak — allow up to 3 concurrent pending builder-only plots and up to 3 BuilderPeasants active at once (prevents slow ramp when hero count is high).
tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py: added test_neutral_buildings_allow_up_to_three_concurrent_plots_and_builders.

game/systems/neutral_buildings.py: queue mixing policy — with 3 slots and demand for multiple types, ensure houses + food can start without waiting for all houses; introduce first farm once, then strict priority for new slots: house > food_stand > farm.
tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py: added test_neutral_buildings_mix_types_before_stacking_houses and test_neutral_buildings_respects_priority_after_one_of_each.
how_to_test: python -m pytest -q tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py tests/test_builder_lumberjack_house.py tests/test_builder_lumberjack_farm.py tests/test_wood_yield_by_growth.py

pytest.command: python -m pytest -q tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py tests/test_builder_lumberjack_house.py tests/test_builder_lumberjack_farm.py tests/test_wood_yield_by_growth.py

what_i_changed: game/sim_engine.py: peasant respawn logic now counts only regular Peasants (non-BuilderPeasant) toward the baseline 'keep 2 alive' workforce; prevents BuilderPeasants from suppressing respawns needed to finish player-placed buildings.
tests/test_peasant_respawn_does_not_count_builder.py (new): regression test ensuring regular peasant respawn occurs even when BuilderPeasants are alive.

sprint_meta.notes: WK49 Wave 2 Agent 05: sim-owned hero identity, bounded memory, known places, career counters.

wk49_r3_identity_memory.what_i_changed: Hero: non-empty hero_id (keyword hero_id= or monotonic h######## fallback), optional name= for tests; profile_memory (HeroMemoryEntry list, cap via hero_memory.PROFILE_MEMORY_MAX_ENTRIES), known_places dict with remember_known_place upsert/dedupe and trim by oldest first_seen; profile_career dict; increment_career_stat; record_profile_memory; hooks: add_gold -> gold_earned, buy_item -> purchases_made, on_attack_landed killed enemy -> enemies_defeated. game/systems/hero_memory.py: caps + stable_place_id. game/systems/bounty.py: bounties_claimed on claim. Tests: tests/test_hero_identity.py, tests/test_hero_memory.py.
follow_ups: tiles_revealed: engine fog/reveal path still mutates _revealed_tiles directly; career counter needs Agent 03 discovery hook.
Gold grants that bypass Hero.add_gold do not increment gold_earned until broader economy attribution migrates to hero_id-aware helpers.

wk49_r8_bugfix_known_places_ranger_xp.what_i_changed: Root cause: ranger FoW tile XP used hero.xp += 1 in game/sim_engine.py, bypassing Hero.add_xp level-up loop so xp could stay >= xp_to_level. Added Hero.grant_tile_exploration_xp (delegates to add_xp) and wired fog reveal path to call it. New tests: tests/test_hero_progression_invariant.py (many small grants, burst vs add_xp parity, profile snapshot invariant).
